publications.title: HackTheBox: Blunder Machine
publications.description: Complete walkthrough of Bludit CMS exploitation and privilege escalation techniques. Covering directory enumeration, brute force attacks, and sudo exploitation. Detailed step-by-step guide with screenshots and command explanations.

publications.title: HackTheBox: OpenAdmin Machine
publications.description: Deep dive into OpenAdmin CMS exploitation and privilege escalation via sudo misconfiguration. Covers reconnaissance, web exploitation, and Linux privilege escalation techniques.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Legacy Machine
publications.description: Windows exploitation focusing on SMB vulnerabilities. Walkthrough of EternalBlue and MS17-010 exploitation on legacy Windows systems.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Sauna Machine
publications.description: Active Directory exploitation through AS-REP roasting and kerberoasting attacks. Detailed walkthrough of AD enumeration and privilege escalation.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Forest Machine
publications.description: Active Directory exploitation through AS-REP roasting and privilege escalation via Exchange privileges. Complete walkthrough of Windows AD attacks.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Admirer Machine
publications.description: Web application exploitation and privilege escalation via Python library hijacking. Covers directory traversal, adminer exploitation, and path hijacking.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Doctor Machine
publications.description: Exploiting SSTI in Flask applications and privilege escalation via Docker groups. Detailed walkthrough of web application security.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Arctic Machine
publications.description: ColdFusion exploitation and privilege escalation on Windows. Detailed guide on exploiting ColdFusion vulnerabilities and Windows privilege escalation.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Bastion Machine
publications.description: Windows enumeration focusing on SMB shares and VHD disk mounting. Walkthrough of backup file exploitation and privilege escalation.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Netmon Machine
publications.description: PRTG Network Monitor exploitation and privilege escalation. Detailed walkthrough of PRTG vulnerability and Windows privilege escalation.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Jeeves Machine
publications.description: Jenkins exploitation and Windows privilege escalation via Keepass. Advanced walkthrough of Jenkins RCE and Windows tokens.

publications.title: HackTheBox: Blue Machine
publications.description: EternalBlue (MS17-010) exploitation on Windows 7. Classic walkthrough of one of the most famous Windows exploits.
